# PHIL.068 ? Conservatism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western
**Subcategory:** conservatism
**Domain:** MODERN_WESTERN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Tradition and custom; gradual change; skepticism of radical reform; organic society; prudence; established institutions

## Application
Value tradition and precedent; incremental change; skeptical of utopian schemes; preserve functioning institutions; practical wisdom

## Key Values
- Tradition
- Gradual change
- Prudence
- Institutional continuity
